prompt: Using the provided reference image as the exact background base, keep the same upscale modern lounge/game-room interior, preserving the room layout, perspective, lighting mood, foosball table, chess table, shelves, pendant lamps, and seating. Add a large anime-style girl in the foreground, centered slightly right and filling most of the frame from thighs up, composited naturally into the scene with correct perspective and soft ambient lighting that matches the room. She should have silver-lavender long twin-tails tied with black ribbons, wear a black-and-white gothic lolita dress with a frilled white blouse, black bow at the collar, black corset waist, and ribbon accents on the sleeves, and make a peace sign with one hand near her face. Render her in polished modern anime illustration style, with detailed hair strands and fabric folds, while leaving the background photorealistic. Cover the face with a plain square mosaic/censor block in the center of the head area. Keep the camera angle close to the original room view and make the added character feel naturally placed in front of the chess table and armchair.
